name: digital-chip-design-agents
description: Full digital chip design pipeline — architecture evaluation through tape-out and firmware. 13 domains, 13 orchestrators, covering RTL, verification, synthesis, physical design, DFT, STA, HLS, SoC integration, compiler toolchain, embedded firmware, and FPGA emulation.

skills.name: architecture
skills.description: Microarchitecture exploration, PPA estimation, risk assessment, and architecture sign-off for digital chip design.

skills.name: compiler-toolchain
skills.description: Compiler toolchain development for custom processor ISAs — LLVM/GCC backend, assembler, linker, runtime libraries, and regression validation.

skills.name: dft
skills.description: Design for Test — scan architecture planning, scan insertion, ATPG pattern generation, MBIST for embedded memories, and JTAG boundary scan.

skills.name: embedded-firmware
skills.description: Embedded firmware and device drivers — BSP development, peripheral driver implementation, RTOS integration, and system validation.

skills.name: formal-verification
skills.description: Formal property verification (FPV) and logical equivalence checking (LEC) for digital chip design.

skills.name: fpga-emulation
skills.description: FPGA prototyping — ASIC-to-FPGA RTL adaptation, multi-FPGA partitioning, synthesis, hardware bring-up, and software validation.

skills.name: functional-verification
skills.description: UVM-based functional verification — testbench architecture, test planning, constrained-random stimulus, coverage closure, and regression sign-off.

skills.name: hls
skills.description: High-Level Synthesis — C/C++ algorithm analysis, HLS directive optimisation, synthesis execution, and co-simulation verification.

skills.name: logic-synthesis
skills.description: Logic synthesis from RTL to gate-level netlist — SDC constraint validation, compile optimisation, netlist quality check, and LEC equivalence verification.

skills.name: physical-design
skills.description: Full physical design flow — floorplan, placement, clock tree synthesis, routing, timing optimisation, power optimisation, area optimisation, and tape-out sign-off.

skills.name: rtl-design
skills.description: SystemVerilog RTL design — module planning, coding standards enforcement, lint checking, CDC/RDC analysis, and synthesis readiness verification.

skills.name: soc-integration
skills.description: SoC IP integration — IP procurement and qualification, IP configuration, bus fabric setup, top-level RTL integration, and chip-level simulation.

skills.name: sta
skills.description: Static timing analysis — multi-corner constraint validation, setup and hold analysis, timing exception review, and ECO guidance for closure.

agents.name: architecture-orchestrator
agents.description: Orchestrates the full architecture evaluation flow from product specification through microarchitecture sign-off.

agents.name: compiler-orchestrator
agents.description: Orchestrates compiler toolchain development for custom processor ISAs — ISA analysis, LLVM/GCC backend, assembler, linker, runtime libraries, and regression validation.

agents.name: dft-orchestrator
agents.description: Orchestrates the DFT flow from architecture through scan insertion, ATPG pattern generation, BIST, JTAG, and sign-off.

agents.name: firmware-orchestrator
agents.description: Orchestrates embedded firmware development — BSP, peripheral drivers, RTOS integration, validation, and system integration.

agents.name: formal-orchestrator
agents.description: Orchestrates formal property verification (FPV) and logical equivalence checking (LEC).

agents.name: fpga-orchestrator
agents.description: Orchestrates FPGA prototyping — ASIC-to-FPGA RTL adaptation, partitioning, FPGA synthesis, hardware bring-up, and software validation.

agents.name: hls-orchestrator
agents.description: Orchestrates High-Level Synthesis — C/C++ algorithm analysis, directive optimisation, synthesis, RTL QC, and co-simulation verification.

agents.name: physical-design-orchestrator
agents.description: Orchestrates the full physical design flow — floorplan, placement, CTS, routing, timing optimisation, power optimisation, area optimisation, and tape-out sign-off.

agents.name: rtl-design-orchestrator
agents.description: Orchestrates the RTL design flow from module planning through lint-clean, CDC-clean, synthesis-ready sign-off.

agents.name: soc-integration-orchestrator
agents.description: Orchestrates SoC IP integration — IP procurement and qualification, IP configuration, bus fabric setup, top-level RTL integration, and chip-level simulation sign-off.

agents.name: sta-orchestrator
agents.description: Orchestrates static timing analysis — multi-corner constraint validation, path analysis, timing exception review, ECO guidance, and timing sign-off.

agents.name: synthesis-orchestrator
agents.description: Orchestrates logic synthesis from RTL to verified gate-level netlist — SDC constraint validation, compile exploration, netlist quality check, and LEC equivalence verification.

agents.name: verification-orchestrator
agents.description: Orchestrates the UVM functional verification flow from testbench architecture through coverage-closed regression sign-off.
